summary: Iteration 5 BLOCKER fixes verified. (1) SlotSpinner crash is GONE — DraftScreen.jsx now imports useEffect and defines ALL_TEAM_LABELS at module scope from SEASONS; clicking roll-dice-button proceeds through the 900ms spinner and reveals a real team without any PAGEERROR and without unmounting the React tree (body innerText stays full, no collapse to 'Made with Emergent'). (2) Stray '}' text node at App.js line 173 is GONE — document.body.innerText now ends with 'Made with Emergent' (no trailing '}'). (3) Ballon d'Or 99 + tier-blackicon was VISUALLY confirmed on a real pool roll: Lothar Matthäus rendered with OVR=99, a 'BALLON D'OR' badge, and the dark/black icon card style — exactly as specified, regardless of his season-specific overall. The full knockout/ET/penalty/trophy flow could not be exhaustively exercised end-to-end in headless because the strict wing-flex + duplicate-name + slot-fit rules combined with random pool rolls cause the automation to plateau at ~4/11 placements (a stochastic CHANGE/roll budget problem, NOT a bug). The iteration-5 source for those downstream features is already confirmed correct in iteration_5.json (POSITIVE review comments for matchEngine ET/pens, MatchScreen leg-swap+speed picker+penalty reveal, TournamentScreen post_group, App.js trophy-on-close).
action_items: Optional QA polish: the draft is currently impossible to script reliably because pitch slots have data-testid 'pitch-slot-N' but pool cards 'pool-player-N' do not expose a stable [disabled] attribute (motion.button passes `disabled={disabled}` but combined with Framer Motion the attribute is sometimes absent in DOM; recommend also setting `aria-disabled` for testability).

Optional: expose computed 'placeable' status as a data attribute on pool cards (e.g. data-placeable='true|false') so e2e scripts and the next testing agent can deterministically pick placeable players instead of relying on visual `.opacity-30` / `grayscale` class detection.
No functional changes needed for iteration-5. Main agent can mark iteration-5 as complete.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED — /app/frontend/src/screens/DraftScreen.jsx line 1: `useEffect` is now imported. Lines 14-17: `ALL_TEAM_LABELS` is now declared at module scope and built from SEASONS via Object.entries(SEASONS).flatMap(...). SlotSpinner (lines 286-309) now mounts cleanly: setInterval cycles `idx` every 70ms, render uses `cur.crest` + `cur.label`. Confirmed no PAGEERROR and no React tree unmount on first roll.

FIXED — /app/frontend/src/App.js line 173: now reads `} />}` (one closing brace). document.body.innerText no longer contains a trailing '}' text node. Verified across home → formation → draft transitions.

POSITIVE (re-confirmed by visual) — /app/frontend/src/data/ballonDor.js + PlayerCard.jsx: Lothar Matthäus rolled with Bayern 1999 displayed as OVR=99, tier-blackicon card styling, and 'BALLON D'OR' yellow ribbon badge — exactly as iteration-5 spec.
NIT — DraftScreen.jsx SlotSpinner uses Math.floor(Math.random()*7) jump and 70ms interval, which gives ~12 frames in the 900ms window. Looks great visually; no issue.

NIT — App.js handleConfirmBack/handleConfirmContinue and useEffect persist call: trophyTeam intentionally NOT persisted (only set after MatchScreen close on Final.userWon). This correctly avoids the iteration-4 'Kazandın spam during simulation' bug; confirmed via static review and no premature TrophyScreen during automated runs.

success_rate.backend: N/A (frontend-only app, backend testing was skipped per request)
success_rate.frontend: 100% on the two iteration-5 blockers (SlotSpinner crash + stray '}'); 100% on Ballon d'Or 99 styling (visually confirmed); downstream knockout/ET/penalty/trophy flow not exhaustively driven e2e in this run but source remains as POSITIVE-reviewed in iteration_5.json

test_credentials: none required (no auth in this app)
seed_data_creation: none; tests clear localStorage at start so save state is fresh
context_for_next_testing_agent: If a deeper e2e is requested again, the bottleneck is the draft auto-fill. Recommended approach: (a) inject a pre-built XI directly into localStorage under SAVE_KEY='ucl_draft_save_v1' with screen='tactics', formationId='4-3-3', xi=[11 player objects], changes={remaining:3,luckyRemaining:1}, then reload — this jumps the automation straight to Tactics → Tournament and exercises group stage / R16 / QF / SF / Final / Trophy without needing to fight wing-flex placement rules. (b) For ET/penalty reveal verification, set localStorage 'ucl_match_speed_v1'='ultra' before play-r16-button to shorten timing. (c) Pitch slots use [data-testid='pitch-slot-N'] (NOT 'slot-N'). (d) Pool cards use [data-testid='pool-player-N']; placeable detection currently requires reading computed class for 'grayscale' or 'cursor-not-allowed' since the [disabled] attribute is rendered inconsistently through framer-motion's motion.button. (e) Stray '}' fix and SlotSpinner crash fix are both confirmed live — no need to re-verify those in future iterations.
rca of the issue: Both iteration-5 P0/P1 root causes have been correctly addressed: (1) the missing `useEffect` import was added and (2) the missing module-level `ALL_TEAM_LABELS` array was defined from SEASONS (an even better choice than CHAMPIONS — gives full season-team coverage for the spinner). The extra '}' in App.js line 173 was removed. No regressions observed and Ballon d'Or 99 / tier-blackicon rendering was visually re-confirmed on a real roll.
